title: Berlin AI Builders Meetup (Ojin AIxHaus)
description: Community space powered by Journee (The Human AI Company) where scientists, ML engineers, founders, creators, and AI enthusiasts build the future of AI. Currently curating 2026 events calendar for meetups, workshops, and hackathons. Supported by Cloudflare and offers Google Cloud credits to attendees.

title: AI Tinkerers Berlin - June 17, 2026
description: In-person meetup for engineers, founders, researchers, and product builders working on AI agents, multimodal and voice interfaces, RAG and knowledge systems, AI coding tools, and production AI infrastructure. Features live demos from local builders, technical Q&A, and networking. Demos show real systems or code, not sales decks.

title: BLISS AI Speaker Series 2026
venue: C130, Institut für Chemie, Technische Universität Berlin, Str. des 17. Juni 115, 10623 Berlin
description: BLISS e.V. is the AI organization in Berlin connecting machine learning enthusiasts. This summer 2026 speaker series features excellent researchers from institutions including cohere, ETH Zürich, University of Oxford, HuggingFace, and Stanford University. The event includes a 45-minute research talk followed by networking with free drinks and pizza. The June 17 event features Thomas Wimmer from ETH Zürich discussing 'Beyond Patches: Learning Dense Visual Features'.
description_local: BLISS e.V. ist die KI-Organisation in Berlin, die Gleichgesinnte verbindet, die großes Interesse und Leidenschaft für das Gebiet des maschinellen Lernens teilen. Im Sommer 2026 veranstalten wir wieder eine spannende Speaker-Reihe vor Ort in Berlin mit exzellenten Forschern.

title: AI Agents Summit 2026 (AIS26)
description: Flagship gathering for the global agentic ecosystem. Under the theme 'From Chatbots to Autonomous Economies', explores how agents coordinate with each other and with humans, how they create and capture value and revenue, and how much autonomy we can safely give them across digital networks.

title: DeSci.Berlin 2026
description: The 5th edition of DeSci.Berlin, taking place in the heart of Kreuzberg during Berlin Blockchain Week. This event is for scientists, AI engineers, web3 builders, biotech founders, institutions and believers in a more open, accelerated research economy. The event focuses on scientific singularity and agentic science.
description_local: Die 5. Ausgabe von DeSci.Berlin findet im Herzen von Kreuzberg während der Berlin Blockchain Week statt, am 18. und 19. Juni 2026. Wissenschaft wird programmierbar, modular und zunehmend autonom. Dieses Event ist für Wissenschaftler, KI-Ingenieure, Web3-Builder, Biotech-Gründer und Befürworter einer offeneren, beschleunigten Forschungsökonomie.

title: The AI Agent Workshop: BERLIN
description: Half-day in-person workshop (12:00-6:00 PM) focused on building self-improving AI agents using reinforcement learning. Includes sessions on specializing open-source LLMs, serverless RL, tool use, MCP integration, and evaluation workflows.

title: Berlin Robotics x AI Hackathon
venue: Lohmühlenstr. 65, 12435 Berlin (CIC Innovation Campus, Treptow-Köpenick district)
description: 48-hour hackathon (June 20-21) for robotics engineers, software developers, designers, and entrepreneurs. Focuses on merging Robotics with Agentic AI to engineer functional, real-world solutions. Features hands-on innovation with agentic coding and robotics hardware, expert mentorship from industry leaders in robotics and AI.

title: {Tech: Europe} Berlin AI Hackathon
description: Full weekend AI hackathon with hacking, learning, and networking. Limited to 90 participants. Includes opening & matchmaking, competition, finalist pitches, and award ceremony. First come, first serve entry.

title: CONNECTED Berlin
description: One-day in-person event focused on concrete AI use cases and integration of AI into existing IT landscapes, especially Microsoft and SAP environments. Features impulse formats, sessions, and moderated discussions. Designed for CEOs, CIOs, CTOs, CDOs, and IT decision-makers.

title: GITEX AI EUROPE 2026
description: Two-day event (June 30 - July 1) bringing together Europe's AI pioneers, enterprise leaders, frontier startups, investors and policymakers. Features AI Everything Europe showcasing cutting-edge AI use cases, North Star Europe for startups & scaleups, and multiple conference tracks. Expected 30,000+ tech & business leaders, 2,000+ enterprises & startups, 600+ investors.

title: Agentic AI HR 2026 - 2. Jahreskonferenz
description: Two-day conference (July 1-2) bringing together HR leaders to discuss latest advances and best practices in using Agentic AI in human resources.

title: International Conference on AI-driven Data Science and Machine Learning Applications (ICADSL)
description: International conference on AI-driven data science and machine learning applications. Virtual and in-person attendance options available.

title: Language AI Meetup Berlin - July 2026
description: Language AI Meetup is a platform to discuss all things related to artificial intelligence and language with regular community events in Berlin. The community is dedicated to exploring and engaging in enlightening conversations about the intersection of language and AI, connecting practitioners, researchers and language aficionados.
description_local: Plattform zur Diskussion aller Themen rund um künstliche Intelligenz und Sprache mit regelmäßigen Community-Events in Berlin.

title: Global AI Berlin
description: In-person AI community event, part of the global Global AI Community network. Time: 17:00-20:00 CET.

title: WeAreDevelopers World Congress 2026
venue: CityCube Berlin (Messe Berlin South Entrance), Jafféstraße, 14055 Berlin
description: Three-day conference (July 8-10) for developers, AI innovators, and tech leaders. Covers AI, LLMs, Cloud, DevOps, Software Architecture. Features 500+ hours of keynotes, workshops, masterclasses, and tech expo. Expected 15,000+ participants from 100+ countries.

title: Agentic AI Summit Berlin 2026
description: Engineering-first conference for AI engineers, developers, and executives building and deploying advanced agentic AI systems. Focuses on multi-agent architectures and production deployment, beyond single-model chatbots toward autonomous, multi-agent workflows.

title: BIG BANG KI Festival
description: Two-day festival (September 16-17) featuring 350+ speakers across six stages from business, tech, health and politics. Expected 11,000+ guests. Includes keynotes, panels, masterclasses, networking, and street food. All participants receive an official AI certificate. Aimed at C-level, entrepreneurs, decision-makers and startups.

title: Enterprise AI Summit
description: Premier event for top-level networking among AI and machine learning decision-makers. Over 500 participants from Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. 2.5-day program with success stories, cutting-edge technologies, practical use cases from fraud detection to predictive analytics. Topics include Applied AI, ML, Business Analytics, Deep Learning, NLP.

title: AI & Data Summit 2026
description: Two-day conference (September 22-23) - Europe's leading conference on AI and data applications in business. Features experts from industry, politics and research discussing AI regulations, business model development, and legal frameworks.

title: AI, Data & Quantum Summit (AIDAQ 2026)
description: AI, Data and Quantum Summit will take place on 22 and 23 September 2026 live at bcc Berlin. As major European event dedicated to the latest trends in data, AI and quantum computing, the summit offers a unique opportunity to explore best practices. Focus on AI regulation and governance, trustworthy and secure systems, European and national quantum strategies, and the implications for defence, critical infrastructure and resilient technology ecosystems.
description_local: Der AI, Data and Quantum Summit findet am 22. und 23. September 2026 live im bcc Berlin statt. Als bedeutende europäische Veranstaltung zu den neuesten Trends in Daten, KI und Quantencomputing bietet der Gipfel eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, Best Practices zu erkunden.

title: AI, Machine Learning & Data Science Conference
description: Three-day conference (October 12-14, 2026) bringing together global experts, researchers, and industry leaders. Theme: 'AI, Machine Learning & Data Science: Driving the Next Wave of Digital Transformation'. Features nearly thirty focused scientific sessions, keynote lectures, interactive presentations, and poster sessions.

title: The Berlin AI Conference 2026
description: Evening event (6 PM - 10 PM) gathering 150 business, innovation, product, and tech leaders from across Berlin. Features a 45-minute panel discussion (6:30-7:15 PM) with six speakers including AI leaders from Babbel, Rhapsody, and Charité. Includes complimentary drinks, snacks, and access to a networking app. Hosted by Startup Network Europe.

title: NVIDIA GTC Berlin 2026
description: The NVIDIA GTC AI conference comes to Berlin, bringing together developers, researchers, and industry leaders to explore AI infrastructure. Sessions span the five-layer AI stack from hardware components to industries being transformed by physical AI. Features CEO Jensen Huang's keynote at the iconic Tempodrom, followed by dynamic sessions, hands-on labs, and networking at STATION-Berlin. Registration opens mid-June 2026.
description_local: Die NVIDIA GTC KI-Konferenz kommt nach Berlin und bringt Entwickler, Forscher und Branchenführer zusammen, um KI-Infrastruktur zu erkunden.

title: MLcon Berlin 2026
description: Five-day event (Nov 16-20, 2026) focusing on Generative AI, LLMs, MLOps, ML Strategy and machine learning technologies. Features workshops, keynotes, bootcamps, and networking opportunities. Expo days: Nov 18-19, 2026. Available in-person or online.

title: KI-X HR Convention
description: Two-day convention (November 18-19) showing how companies from SMEs to enterprises are implementing AI in HR practice. Covers AI-supported recruiting, talent management, employee development, predictive analytics, and automated workflows.
